# Kit component contract (`@/components/ui`)

Import every UI component from `@/components/ui` (never antd, never raw DOM, never deep paths).
This is the machine-readable contract: each component's **required** props are listed first.
Cross-cutting rules every agent must follow:

- **`data-testid` is REQUIRED** on all functional/container/value/action components (Button, Card,
  Input, Select, Table, Form, …). It must be **globally unique** (a build-time Vite plugin fails the
  build on cross-file duplicates). Use a module-scoped kebab id, e.g. `user-form-email`.
- **Accessible name is REQUIRED** where there's no visible label: icon-only `Button` needs `tooltip`
  (or `aria-label`); `FormField` needs `label` or `aria-label`; closable `Tag`/`Alert` need `closeLabel`.
- Collection items (List/Table rows, Menu/Tabs items, Select options) auto-derive their testid from
  the container's testid — give the CONTAINER a testid and the rows are covered.
- Never import `antd`, never use raw `<button>/<input>/<select>/<textarea>` (Biome blocks both).

65 components documented.

| prop | type | notes |

| `ellipsis` | `boolean | undefined` | Single-line truncation with ellipsis (legacy `ellipsis`). |

| `style` | `CSSProperties | undefined` |  |
| `tone` | `"default" | "secondary" | "destructive" | "success" | "warning" | "muted" | "danger" | …` | Kit tones + legacy `type` aliases (secondary/success/warning/danger). |
| `type` | `"secondary" | "success" | "warning" | "danger" | undefined` | legacy `type` — alias of `tone`. |

| `onThemeChange` | `((theme: ThemePreference) => void) | undefined` | Called when the preference changes (required in controlled mode). |
| `storageKey` | `string | undefined` | localStorage key when uncontrolled. |

| prop | type | notes |

| `label` | `string` | Accessible label for the file input (required — i18n). |
| `onFiles` | `(files: File[]) => void` |  |

| `multiple` | `boolean | undefined` |  |
